dashboard.label: pfSense DNSBL
dashboard.description: DNSBL (pfBlockerNG) visibility for blocked domains, clients, feeds, and investigations.

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | stats count by src_ip | sort - count | head 200
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | stats count by feed_name | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | stats count by dnsbl_group_name | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | stats count by dnsbl_type | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | stats count by dnsbl_block_type | sort - count

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | addinfo | stats count as blocks max(info_min_time) as info_min_time max(info_max_time) as info_max_time | eval duration_minutes=(info_max_time-info_min_time)/60 | eval blocks_per_min=if(duration_minutes>0, round(blocks/duration_minutes,2), 0) | fields blocks_per_min

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats dc(blocked_domain) as domains

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats dc(src_ip) as clients

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval event_epoch=strptime(date_timestamp." ".date_year,"%b %e %H:%M:%S %Y") | eval _time=coalesce(event_epoch,_time) | where _time<=now() | timechart span=1h count as blocks

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval event_epoch=strptime(date_timestamp." ".date_year,"%b %e %H:%M:%S %Y") | eval _time=coalesce(event_epoch,_time) | where _time<=now() | timechart span=1h dc(blocked_domain) as unique_domains

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count as blocks by blocked_domain | sort - blocks | head 20 | rename blocked_domain as domain

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count as blocks by feed_name | sort - blocks | head 15

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count as blocks min(_time) as first_seen by blocked_domain | lookup pfsense_known_dnsbl_domains_prev7d blocked_domain OUTPUT last_seen as history_last_seen | where isnull(history_last_seen) AND blocks>=5 | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%F %T") | sort - blocks | head 20

panel.title: Number of Blocked Domains by Client

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval src_ip_norm=src_ip, dest_ip_norm=null(), src_display=src_ip_norm, dest_display=dest_ip_norm | `pfsense_ip_labels` | eval src_ip_label=src_display | stats dc(blocked_domain) as blocked_domains by src_ip_label | rename src_ip_label as src_ip | sort - blocked_domains | head 50

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:dnsbl | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), group_tok=if("$group$"="", "*", "$group$"), type_tok=if("$dnsbl_type$"="", "*", "$dnsbl_type$"), block_tok=if("$block_type$"="", "*", "$block_type$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search blocked_domain="$domain$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (group_tok="*" OR dnsbl_group_name=group_tok) AND (type_tok="*" OR dnsbl_type=type_tok) AND (block_tok="*" OR dnsbl_block_type=block_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval src_ip_norm=src_ip, dest_ip_norm=null(), src_display=src_ip_norm, dest_display=dest_ip_norm | `pfsense_ip_labels` | eval src_ip_label=src_display | eval event_epoch=strptime(date_timestamp." ".date_year,"%b %e %H:%M:%S %Y") | sort 0 - event_epoch | head 100 | eval event_time=strftime(event_epoch,"%F %T") | eval duplicate_label=case(duplicate_event_status="+","Duplicate", duplicate_event_status="-","New", 1=1, "Unknown") | table event_time src_ip_label blocked_domain feed_name dnsbl_group_name dnsbl_block_type duplicate_label | rename src_ip_label as src_ip duplicate_label as duplicate_status
